content.headline: We Have 347 Units Left at 55% Off — After That, This Price Is Gone for Good
content.subheadline: The 950g blower that's giving thousands of seniors their independence back. Today only: $119.99 + 3 free gifts. Here's why we're practically giving it away.

sections.body_html:
We over-ordered. Our warehouse is full. And we'd rather you benefit than wait six months to sell at full price.

This week, we're running the deepest discount we've ever offered on the Seese Pro™ — the cordless blower that weighs less than a bag of sugar, blows at over 200 MPH, and lets you clean your entire property in under 5 minutes. One hand. No back pain. No asking for help.

55% off. 3 free gifts. Free shipping. But only while the 347 remaining units last — and at the current rate, that won't be long.

visual_placeholder.description: Person 65+ holding Seese Pro with one hand, smiling naturally on a clean autumn terrace — golden light, posture relaxed and confident, no sign of effort

sections.heading: Why Is It 55% Off Right Now?
sections.body_html:
Honest answer: we planned for a bigger season than we had. Our warehouse in France is sitting on inventory we need to move — and passing the savings to you is a better use of it than a storage bill.

The regular price of the Seese Pro™ is $249.99. Today, it's $119.99. That's $0.33 a day for a full year — less than a coffee. And unlike a coffee, it gives you your driveway, your terrace, and your independence back.

This is not a permanent price. When the 347 units are gone, the discount goes with them. No extensions, no exceptions.

visual_placeholder.description: Overhead warehouse shot with stacked Seese Pro boxes — urgency visual with a counter overlay showing low remaining stock

sections.heading: Everything You Get — At This Price
sections.body_html:
This isn't just a blower. It replaces four tools you already own — and clears out the clutter in your garage while it's at it.

  • ✅ Seese Pro™ Cordless Blower (950g · 200+ MPH · 30,000 RPM · brushless motor) — $249.99 $119.99
  • ✅ Extra 21V Rechargeable Battery Pack — $49.99 FREE
  • ✅ Premium Ear Protection — $19.99 FREE
  • ✅ $40 Store Gift Card — FREE
  • ✅ Rigid Carrying Case — INCLUDED
  • ✅ Lifetime Replacement Warranty — INCLUDED
  • ✅ 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee — INCLUDED
  • ✅ Free Shipping from our French warehouse — FREE

Total real value: $379.96. Your price today: $119.99.

visual_placeholder.description: Rigid carrying case open on a clean garage workbench — Seese Pro blower, battery, accessories arranged neatly, everything visible at a glance

sections.heading: Your Offer — Valid While Stock Lasts
sections.body_html:
Here's exactly what you're getting right now:

Seese Pro™ Ultra-Light Cordless Blower
Regular price: $249.99
Today: $119.99 — 55% Off
+ Extra Battery + Ear Protection + $40 Gift Card (total gift value: $110)
+ Free Shipping + Lifetime Warranty + 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee

There's no risk here. Try it for 30 days. Clean your terrace, dry your car, clear your windshield. If it doesn't feel like the easiest tool you've ever used, send it back — full refund, no questions, no hassle.

But don't wait to decide. Only 23% of discounted units remain. Once they're gone, we go back to $249.99 — no exceptions, no re-runs.
